one_time_description: Prior period adjustment related to Agricultural Benefit Pre-Settlement Trust, increasing long-term liabilities by $2,626,938 and insurance/related expenses by $2,114,843
economic_notes: Nation has seven business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Sunchild Construction GP Ltd., Sunchild Gravel GP Ltd., Sunchild Store (2005) Ltd., Sunchild Oil & Gas Ltd., Sunchild Utilities Limited Partnership, Sunchild Business Development GP Corp., and Sunchild First Nation Child and Family Services Society. Combined revenues across subsidiaries exceed $7.7M.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Prior period adjustment restated 2022 comparatives due to Agricultural Benefit Pre-Settlement Trust corrections increasing long-term liabilities by $2,626,938 and expenses by $2,114,843. Seven entities accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Trust funds - Capital grew significantly from $1.9M to $8.6M due to $7.8M in earnings. Promissory note of $2,616,724 due to Minister of Crown-Indigenous Relations is interest-free pending settlement of Agricultural Benefits and Treaty Land Entitlement claims. Net loss on the consolidated statement is $(3,183,858) after amortization and tangible capital asset acquisitions; operating surplus before capital is $7,219,823. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + Health Canada + ISET + CMHC = $30,867,454 plus other government sources; osr calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers. Schedule of remuneration not included in the financial statements provided.
